page_metadata.biotools__summary: Lots of information on fugu including complete draft sequence, annotations, comparative vertebrate genomics, phylogenies, publications, and information about the fugu genome project; has some very useful tools including annotation tools, an Ensembl mirror, and BLAST.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Lots of information on fugu including complete draft sequence, annotations, comparative vertebrate genomics, phylogenies, publications, and information about the fugu genome project; has some very useful tools including annotation tools, an Ensembl mirror, and BLAST.
